operations.summary: Get the specific objects or rules identified for the risk results
Get the specific objects or rules identified for the cleanup results

operations.notes:
Fetches set of Cleanup calculation results for a device given by ID.
Only fully shadowed rules (cleanup code C01) are supported.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Starting page for query allowable values are numeric

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of pages for query result allowable values are numeric

operations.notes: Find shadowing rules for given shadowed rules of a specific device

parameters.name: shadowed_uids
parameters.description: UIDs of shadowed rules separated by commas

protocol.description: The port number, for IP service: protocol is not specified.

min.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the minimum port number, ICMP Service: the ICMP type number.

max.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the maximum port number.

negate.description: Negates the defined port(s), that is: the defined port(s) are ignored, and only all other logs are analyzed.

timeout.description: The timeout value for the service in seconds

minSource.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the minimum source port number, ICMP Service: the ICMP type number.

maxSource.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the maximum source port number.

overrides.description: Original value override, applicable only for Panorama NG
